summary.label: Reviews in this feed
summary.note: The count and rating describe only the records in this file. Source provenance remains subject to clinic verification.

reviews.name: Elena
reviews.text: Iulia is highly experienced and I have complete confidence in her expertise. The studio is clean, comfortable, and fully equipped to ensure a great experience and quality treatment. I would highly recommend her.

reviews.name: Tatjana
reviews.text: Iulia is love from the very first visit. Kind, attentive, with truly magical hands. After her treatments you feel light, happy, and full of energy. Her facial treatments are simply amazing, with a cozy space, calming atmosphere, and genuine care.

reviews.name: Natalia
reviews.text: I was slightly late but Iulia was accommodating and efficient, so we finished the procedure on time. I love the result!

reviews.name: Maria
reviews.text: Yulia is a really professional and caring beauty therapist. She always gives good advice based on your needs. I have been going to her for many years now and can definitely recommend her services.

reviews.name: Alice
reviews.text: Lovely and clean, and the treatment went really well.

reviews.name: Fatemeh
reviews.text: Iulia is highly professional, skilled, and very friendly.

reviews.name: Roisin
reviews.text: A welcoming visit with a comfortable experience and clear care throughout the appointment.

reviews.name: Alice
reviews.text: A perfect appointment with careful treatment and a calm finish.

reviews.name: Clare
reviews.text: Excellent service in a friendly, professional studio.

reviews.name: Sayed
reviews.text: Careful laser treatment with a reassuring appointment and smooth experience.

reviews.name: Elena
reviews.text: A professional visit with a clean studio, comfortable setting, and confident care.
